context: Tests whether the device-integrity skill designs App Attest assertions that are bound to sensitive requests and verified correctly.

checklist.name: One-time assertion challenge
checklist.description: Requires a fresh one-time server challenge for the assertion flow and embeds it in client data.

checklist.name: Request binding
checklist.description: Includes request context or a request-body hash in signed client data so the assertion is bound to the sensitive request.

checklist.name: Signature verification input
checklist.description: Verifies the assertion signature over `SHA256(authenticatorData || SHA256(clientData))` using the public key stored from attestation.

checklist.name: Authenticator checks
checklist.description: Checks RP ID hash, monotonically increasing counter, and the embedded challenge before accepting the request.

checklist.name: Security boundary
checklist.description: Keeps normal user authentication and entitlement authorization separate from App Attest, which proves app-instance integrity rather than purchase or account status.
